arts.ttl: Marco Rose reveals how Unai Emery 'makes it easier' as RB Leipzig boss delivers brutal truth
arts.sum: Leipzig ended that winless spell by winning two matches last week - just like Villa did - but they are only one of three clubs in the Champions League who are yet to pick up a single point after five matches after being defeated by Atletico Madrid, Juventus, Liverpool, Celtic and Inter. We have had success before and now we want to bring our fans a win in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa loanee given just 3/10 after being hauled off – Another relegation may be on way
arts.sum: Valencia are currently 19th out of the 20 clubs in La Liga. Getafe occupy the closest safety spot in 17th with three points more. Getafe have played a match more but even if Valencia won their game in hand they wouldn’t be safe to an inferior goal difference. arts.ttl: How much money Aston Villa have won in Champions League prize money so far
arts.sum: Aston Villa made the perfect return to the top table of European football by winning each of their first three Champions League games, but dropped out of the top eight of the league phase table after taking one point from games against Club Brugge and Juventus. Villa still have games to look forward to against RB Leipzig on Tuesday night, AS Monaco on January 21, before the final match against Celtic a week later on January 29.
James Milton assesses all 18 matches in the Champions League this week and delivers a score prediction for every game.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa predicted XI vs RB Leipzig as Unai Emery unleashes dynamic duo
arts.sum: Villa lost 1-0 in Brugge in bizarre circumstances after Tyrone Mings picked the ball up inside his own penalty area unaware that Emi Martinez had taken a goal kick, before Hans Vanaken converted the resulting penalty. Villa predicted XI vs Leipzig: Martinez, Cash, Konsa, Mings, Digne, Kamara, Barkley, McGinn, Rogers, Duran, Watkins.

arts.ttl: A decision on the future of RB Leipzig head coach Marco Rose to be made over the winter break

arts.ttl: RB Leipzig vs. Aston Villa preview: Team news and predicted lineups
arts.sum: Here is our preview of Tuesday's Champions League clash between RB Leipzig and Aston Villa, including our predicted lineups.

arts.ttl: RB Leipzig could be without seven players for Aston Villa clash
arts.sum: RB Leipzig could be without seven first-team players for their Champions League clash with Aston Villa on Tuesday. Villa, meanwhile, are sitting on 10 points after winning their opening three matches, losing to Club Brugge and drawing with Juventus last month.

arts.ttl: Crisis, desperation and why RB Leipzig must beat Aston Villa in the Champions League
arts.sum: Leipzig returned to winning ways against Frankfurt in the German Cup last Wednesday and winger Antonio Nusa claimed afterwards that there was no added pressure on him and his teammates to impress despite their lack of results across November. "I can't think of a better coach for us at the moment," he told DAZN after Leipzig's most recent Champions League defeat against Inter.
